summary: General Mediated Mode is an evolutionary intelligence mediation layer that deeply analyzes arbitrary targets to prepare high-quality contextual cognition for large-model interaction. - **Mediated AI:** The platform acts as a bridge between the target and the external LLM. - **Evolutionary Context:** Understanding of the target is evolved through multiple analysis passes. - **Human-in-the-loop:** The user supervises and approves the discovered context and proposed prompts. - **TargetScanner:** Recursively identifies files and detects technologies. - **SemanticExtractor:** Extracts architectural patterns and semantic markers using heuristics. - **ContextCurator:** Selects high-value context while avoiding token floods. - **PromptSynthesizer:** Generates architecturally informed prompts based on the evolved understanding.
